// libs/modules/{{feature-name}}/src/domain/entities/{{feature-name}}.entity.ts
//
// Domain Entity — pure TypeScript, zero framework dependencies.
// All business invariants belong here.

export class {{FeatureName}} {
  constructor(
    public readonly id: number,
    public readonly createdAt: Date,
    public readonly updatedAt: Date | null,
    // TODO: add {{FeatureName}}-specific fields here
  ) {}

  // Example factory method — adapt or remove as needed
  static create(
    params: Omit<{{FeatureName}}, 'id' | 'createdAt' | 'updatedAt'>,
  ): Omit<{{FeatureName}}, 'id'> {
    return {
      ...params,
      createdAt: new Date(),
      updatedAt: null,
    };
  }
}
